assertions.name: required fields exist
assertions.expr: isinstance(body, dict) and all(k in body for k in ['balance', 'equity', 'currency', 'is_locked'])

assertions.name: balance and equity are non-negative numbers
assertions.expr: isinstance(body.get('balance'), (int, float)) and isinstance(body.get('equity'), (int, float)) and body.get('balance') >= 0 and body.get('equity') >= 0
